tutorials.name: Getting Started
tutorials.description: Recover your tools and get back online

steps.title: Welcome Back
steps.description: Your main rig got seized, but your old home PC is still running on the local network. Time to recover your tools and get back in the game.

steps.title: Find Your Home PC
steps.description: You're offline - only your local network is accessible. Use `scan` to find your old home PC.

steps.title: Connect to Your PC
steps.description: Found it! Your home PC is at `home.pc`. Since it's your computer, no password is needed. Use `connect home.pc` to access it.

steps.title: Explore the Filesystem
steps.description: You're in! Use `ls` to see what's here, then `cd` to navigate. Your old toolkit should be in your home directory.

steps.title: Find Your Tool
steps.description: Your old `password_cracker` survived! You can see it here. Use `get home.pc password_cracker` to download it to your inventory.

steps.title: Exit and Verify
steps.description: Use `exit` to disconnect, then check your tools with `tools`. You should have your password_cracker back!

steps.title: Mission Auto-Completed!
steps.description: You've recovered your tool! The home_recovery mission completes automatically. Internet access is now restored!

steps.title: You're Back Online!
steps.description: Internet restored! Now `scan` will show real servers. Find targets like `test` (easy) or `wifi.coffeeshop`. Use your password_cracker to hack them!

steps.title: Getting Tools
steps.description: Tools are essential for exploitation. Your first tool (password_cracker) came from your home PC. More tools unlock through missions. Check available missions with `mission`.

steps.title: Listing Your Tools
steps.description: Use `tools` to see all tools you own. You need to own a tool before you can use it.

steps.title: Passwords vs Exploits
steps.description: Some services can be accessed with cracked credentials (SSH, Telnet, FTP). Others require an exploit. Scan a server to see its services, then pick the right tool. Example: `password_cracker <targetIP>`

steps.title: Shell Access
steps.description: Once you have access (credentials or exploit), connect to the service to get a shell. Example: `ssh <targetIP>` or `telnet <targetIP>` or `ftp <targetIP>`.

tutorials.name: Cryptocurrency Mining
tutorials.description: Learn how to mine cryptocurrency for passive income

steps.title: Getting the Crypto Miner
steps.description: The `crypto_miner` tool is unlocked through the Field Operations arc. Complete the resource_hijack mission to gain access.

steps.title: Starting a Miner
steps.description: Use `crypto_miner <targetIP>` to start mining on an exploited server. The server must have enough resources (CPU, RAM, bandwidth).

steps.title: Checking Active Miners
steps.description: Use `miners` to see all your active mining sessions. Miners generate cryptocurrency over time.

steps.title: Stopping a Miner
steps.description: Use `stop_mining <targetIP>` to stop a miner when needed.

steps.title: Information Gathering
steps.description: Tools like `user_enum` and `lan_sniffer` help you gather information about servers before exploitation.

steps.title: WiFi Sniffing
steps.description: The `packet_capture` and `password_sniffer` tools let you capture WiFi traffic and extract credentials. Unlock them through the wifi_sniffing mission.

steps.title: Rootkit Installation
steps.description: The `rootkit` tool installs a hidden backdoor for persistent access. Unlock it through the persistent_access mission.

steps.title: Multi-Vulnerability Exploitation
steps.description: The `exploit_kit` and `advanced_exploit_kit` tools can exploit multiple vulnerability types at once. These unlock later through the exploit_at_scale mission.

steps.title: Web Exploitation
steps.description: Tools like `sql_injector` and `xss_exploit` target HTTP services specifically. They unlock through story missions.

steps.title: Network Analysis
steps.description: Use `packet_capture` to capture network traffic, then `packet_decoder` to decode and analyze the captured packets. These unlock through the wifi_sniffing mission.

tutorials.name: Privilege Escalation
tutorials.description: Learn how to escalate privileges after gaining shell access

steps.title: Get a Shell First
steps.description: Privilege escalation happens after you have shell access to a server. Use `connect`, `ssh`, `telnet`, or `ftp` to connect first.

steps.title: Scan for Local Vulnerabilities
steps.description: Use `privesc_scanner` on the server to identify local escalation paths. This tool unlocks through the privilege_escalation mission.

steps.title: Exploit the Weakness
steps.description: Use the appropriate tool based on what you found: `sudo_exploit`, `suid_finder`, or `kernel_exploit`.

tutorials.name: Cover Your Tracks
tutorials.description: Learn how to cover your tracks and avoid detection using stealth tools

steps.title: Why Cover Your Tracks?
steps.description: After exploiting servers, you leave traces in logs and file timestamps. Covering your tracks prevents detection and forensic analysis.

steps.title: Clearing Logs
steps.description: Use `log_cleaner` to delete and clear system logs. This removes evidence of your activities. Unlock through the cover_tracks mission.

steps.title: Modifying Timestamps
steps.description: Use `timestomper` to modify file timestamps. This makes forensic analysis harder by changing when files were accessed or modified.

steps.title: Disabling Auditing
steps.description: Use `audit_disable` to disable system auditing and logging. This prevents future logs from being created.

steps.title: Stealth Workflow
steps.description: The best stealth workflow: 1) Exploit server, 2) Use log_cleaner, 3) Use timestomper, 4) Use audit_disable. This covers past, present, and future tracks!

tutorials.name: Data Heist
tutorials.description: Learn how to extract and crack data from databases

steps.title: Finding Databases
steps.description: Databases are often exposed through web services. Scan servers for HTTP services with SQL injection vulnerabilities.

steps.title: SQL Injection First
steps.description: Before dumping a database, you need to exploit it. Use `sql_injector` to gain access to the database. Unlock through the database_heist mission.

steps.title: Dumping the Database
steps.description: Once you have SQL injection access, use `database_dumper` to extract the entire database contents.

steps.title: Cracking Hashed Passwords
steps.description: Databases often contain hashed passwords. Use `hash_cracker` to crack MD5, SHA256, bcrypt, and other hash types.

steps.title: Complete Heist Workflow
steps.description: The complete data heist: 1) Scan for HTTP services, 2) Use sql_injector, 3) Use database_dumper, 4) Use hash_cracker on extracted hashes. You now have all the data!

tutorials.name: Story Missions
tutorials.description: Learn about story missions and how to unlock exclusive rewards

steps.title: What are Story Missions?
steps.description: Story missions are narrative-driven challenges that unlock exclusive tools and achievements. Complete missions to progress through story arcs and unlock powerful rewards.

steps.title: Viewing Available Missions
steps.description: Use `mission` to see all available missions. Missions are organized by story arcs. Each mission shows its status: ⭕ (not started), 🔄 (in progress), or ✅ (completed).

steps.title: Viewing Mission Details
steps.description: Use `mission <missionID>` to view detailed information about a specific mission, including objectives, required tools, level requirements, and rewards.

steps.title: Starting a Mission
steps.description: Use `mission start <missionID>` to begin a mission. Make sure you meet the prerequisites (completed previous missions) and have the required tools and level.

steps.title: Checking Mission Progress
steps.description: Use `mission status` to view your progress on all started missions. This shows which missions you're working on and their completion percentage.

steps.title: Completing Missions
steps.description: Missions complete automatically when you finish all objectives. No need to type 'mission complete' - just do the objectives and rewards appear!

steps.title: Mission Rewards
steps.description: Mission rewards are exclusive - tools unlocked through missions cannot be purchased from shops. Complete missions to build your arsenal!
